SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2024 - CONTINUED AT REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO JUN-18-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN HOLMES. DEFENDANT JACKLINE MUTUNGI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE OF THIS MATTER TO WORK OUT A STIPULATED AGREEMENT WITH THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-18-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TREASURER AND TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN HOLMES. DEFENDANT JACKLINE MUTUNGI IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES HAVE AN AGREEMENT AND THE DEFENDANT IS MAKING PAYMENTS TO THE PLAINTIFF. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT CALLING, THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
